meaning: n.[植] 悬钩子之类,其果实
examples: The Dewberry offers its guests multiple options for gathering and entertaining that truly elevate their experience.
The Living Room at The Dewberry offers a comfortable space to enjoy a morning coffee or casual midday meeting on the expansive first floor.
The Dewberry Hotel is perfectly situated in the center of Charleston's downtown district, between the Upper and Lower Districts of the Historic Peninsula.
Michelle Dewberry, winner of the BBC television show The Apprentice last year, said she saw someone who had collapsed being resuscitated after about four miles.
